all.en: Dear Valued Client, thank you for choosing Northbridge Insurance over the past year.
all.zh: 親愛的尊貴客戶，感謝您過去一年選擇 Northbridge 保險。

all.en: Your commercial property and liability policy is approaching its annual renewal date.
all.zh: 您的商業財產與責任保單即將屆至年度續約日。

all.en: The current policy will expire at midnight on August 31 of this year.
all.zh: 目前的保單將於今年八月三十一日午夜到期。

all.en: We have prepared a renewal offer based on your updated risk profile.
all.zh: 我們已根據您更新後的風險狀況準備好續約報價。

all.en: Your renewed coverage maintains the existing limits of 5 million dollars per occurrence.
all.zh: 您續約後的保障維持每事故五百萬美元的現有限額。

all.en: Building coverage has been adjusted to reflect recent appraised replacement values.
all.zh: 建築保額已調整以反映近期鑑定的重置價值。

all.en: Business interruption protection has been extended from 12 to 18 months.
all.zh: 營業中斷保障已由十二個月延長至十八個月。

all.en: Equipment breakdown coverage now includes additional cloud-based business systems.
all.zh: 機具故障保障現在增加涵蓋雲端商業系統。

all.en: Cybersecurity endorsements have been enhanced at no additional cost.
all.zh: 資安附加條款已加強保障，且不另收費。

all.en: The total annual premium for the renewal period is 47,820 dollars.
all.zh: 本續約期間之年度保費總額為四萬七千八百二十美元。

all.en: This represents an increase of approximately 4 percent over your prior premium.
all.zh: 此較您先前保費約增加百分之四。

all.en: The change reflects industry-wide trends as well as your favorable claims history.
all.zh: 此變動反映業界整體趨勢以及您良好的理賠紀錄。

all.en: A 5 percent discount has been applied in recognition of your safety program.
all.zh: 因您的安全計畫，已給予百分之五的折扣。

all.en: Payment may be made annually, semi-annually, or quarterly without finance charges.
all.zh: 保費可選擇年繳、半年繳或季繳，皆免收財務手續費。

all.en: Enclosed you will find the renewal quote, schedule of forms, and policy summary.
all.zh: 隨函附上續約報價、條款明細以及保單摘要。

all.en: Please review the documents carefully and verify all coverage details.
all.zh: 請仔細審閱文件並確認所有保障細節。

all.en: Notify us promptly if any business operations or asset values have changed.
all.zh: 若有任何營業內容或資產價值變動，請盡速通知我們。

all.en: We are also happy to provide alternative coverage options upon request.
all.zh: 如有需要，我們亦樂意提供其他保障方案。

all.en: To accept this renewal, please sign and return the acceptance form by August 17.
all.zh: 若同意此續約，請於八月十七日前簽署並寄回承諾書。

all.en: Failure to respond before expiration may result in a lapse of coverage.
all.zh: 若未於到期前回覆，可能導致保障中斷。

all.en: Your dedicated account manager, Karen Bell, remains available to assist you.
all.zh: 您的專屬客戶經理 Karen Bell 仍可隨時為您服務。

all.en: She can be reached at 555-218-0944 or by email at kbell@northbridgeins.com.
all.zh: 可撥打電話 555-218-0944 或透過電子郵件 kbell@northbridgeins.com 聯絡她。

all.en: We deeply appreciate your continued trust and look forward to serving you again.
all.zh: 我們由衷感謝您持續的信任，期待再次為您服務。

all.en: Sincerely, Karen Bell, Senior Account Manager, Northbridge Insurance Group.
all.zh: 謹此，Northbridge 保險集團資深客戶經理 Karen Bell 敬上。

all.en: P.S. Please note that automatic renewal will only take effect after we receive your signed form.
all.zh: 備註：自動續約僅於我們收到您簽署的承諾書後方生效。

all.en: Should you prefer an electronic signature option, secure links can be sent by email.
all.zh: 若您偏好電子簽章選項，可透過電子郵件寄送安全連結。

all.en: A complimentary on-site risk consultation is available to all renewing clients this year.
all.zh: 本年度所有續約客戶均可享免費的現場風險諮詢服務。

all.en: Our loss control engineers can visit your premises within two weeks of your request.
all.zh: 本公司損害防阻工程師可於您提出申請後兩週內至貴單位拜訪。

all.en: We recommend scheduling this consultation prior to the upcoming hurricane season.
all.zh: 我們建議於即將到來的颶風季節前安排此項諮詢。

all.en: Northbridge has also launched a 24-hour online claims reporting service this quarter.
all.zh: Northbridge 本季亦推出二十四小時線上理賠通報服務。

all.en: Clients can now upload supporting documentation directly through our mobile application.
all.zh: 客戶現可透過我們的行動應用程式直接上傳佐證文件。

all.en: Additional liability coverage for product recalls is available as a separate endorsement.
all.zh: 產品回收相關的附加責任保障可作為獨立附加條款另行加保。

all.en: We value transparency and welcome any questions about coverage terms or pricing.
all.zh: 我們重視透明度，歡迎您就保障條款或定價提出任何問題。

all.en: Thank you once again for placing your confidence in Northbridge Insurance Group.
all.zh: 再次感謝您將信任託付給 Northbridge 保險集團。

all.en: A new business interruption calculator is now available on the client self-service portal.
all.zh: 新版營業中斷試算工具現已於客戶自助服務入口開放使用。

all.en: Policyholders can also enroll in our quarterly risk insights newsletter at no charge.
all.zh: 保戶亦可免費訂閱我們每季發行的風險洞察電子報。

all.en: Loyalty discounts of up to 3 percent are available after five consecutive renewal cycles.
all.zh: 連續五次續約後可享最高百分之三的忠誠折扣。

all.en: Flood and earthquake riders can be added prior to the renewal effective date.
all.zh: 洪水及地震附加險可於續約生效日前加保。

all.en: Premium financing through approved third parties is supported for qualified clients.
all.zh: 符合資格的客戶可透過核准的第三方辦理保費融資。

all.en: Certificates of insurance will be issued within one business day upon written request.
all.zh: 保險證明書將於書面申請後一個工作日內出具。

all.en: Our claims advocate team is available to walk you through documentation requirements.
all.zh: 本公司理賠協辦團隊可協助您逐步完成文件準備需求。

all.en: We encourage you to schedule a brief stewardship review with your account manager.
all.zh: 歡迎您與客戶經理安排簡短的服務檢視會議。

all.en: Future correspondence may be delivered via secure email if you prefer paperless billing.
all.zh: 若您偏好無紙化帳單，未來通訊可改透過安全電子郵件寄送。

all.en: We look forward to renewing our partnership and supporting your business in the year ahead.
all.zh: 我們期待續寫合作情誼，並於來年持續支持您的業務發展。
